source-extractor.description: Extract content from a URL (YouTube video or web article) and save it as an immutable raw source page. Detects URL type and routes to the right extractor: youtube-transcript (fallback chain api -> yt-dlp -> whisper) or article-extractor (markitdown -> obscura).

knowledge-indexer.description: Read raw sources (video transcripts and web articles) and curate them into a typed-relationship ontology of concept and entity pages. Compounds knowledge, never duplicates. Maintains index.md and log.md.
